posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Boilermakers Northeast, Local Union #5, Zone #197
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at BoilermakersApprenticeship.com during the recruitment period. Applications must be received by May 11, 2027.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old; proof of age is required at the time of the offer of employment.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED; proof is required at the time of the offer of employment.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to report to remote job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must be willing to submit to a drug/alcohol test within 48 hours of signing the apprentice agreement; the sponsor will pay for the test.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old; proof of age will be required at the time of the offer of employment.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED; proof will be required at the time of an offer of employment.

Must verbally attest that they are physically able to do the work of a Boilermaker (Construction), including working 8 hours continually on feet, lifting and carrying weights in excess of 95 pounds for extended periods, working in extreme weather conditions and temperatures, working in restrictive and confined spaces, working at heights of 20 feet on a scaffold or platform, working in ditches or trenches up to 20 feet in depth, and working in nuclear facilities and hazardous conditions.
Must be willing to submit to a drug/alcohol test within 48 hours of signing the apprentice agreement; the test will be paid for by the sponsor.
Must have reliable transportation to report to remote job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalent, be physically able to perform demanding work, pass a drug/alcohol test, and have reliable transportation.
posting.contactName: Boilermakers Northeast JATC, Local Union #5, Zone #197
posting.contactSummary: Contact Boilermakers Northeast JATC, Local Union #5, Zone #197 at (518) 438-0718 or visit the Boilermakers Northeast JATC website for details.
